question.text: Spot polling prices collected by commodity exchanges are:

answer.text: Ex-warehouse prices inclusive of Mandi Cess but exclusive of GST
Inclusive of both Mandi Cess and GST
Ex-factory prices exclusive of all taxes
Retail consumer prices inclusive of all taxes

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Polled prices are ex-warehouse prices inclusive of Mandi Cess but exclusive of GST. **The Trap:** They don't include GST. They are not ex-factory prices. They are not retail consumer prices. The specific tax treatment matters for accurate futures pricing. **Cross-Exam Context:** Tax treatment of commodity prices is specific to this exam. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When comparing spot polling prices to actual purchase costs, clients must add GST — this can significantly affect the effective cost basis for delivery-based settlement.
